# SolPrep

> Free Virginia SOL (Standards of Learning) practice platform for grades 3–8. Built by a Virginia parent for kids who learn differently — with real VDOE released test questions, adaptive learning tiers, and built-in IEP/504 accommodations.

SolPrep is a web application at https://solprep.app. It is **not affiliated with SOLPrep.com**, which is a separate, unrelated website.

## What SolPrep Does

- Provides 3,700+ questions extracted directly from official VDOE released SOL tests (public domain)
- Covers **Math and Reading** for **grades 3–8**
- Three adaptive learning tiers: **Foundational** (simplified vocabulary and sentence structure), **Simplified** (scaffolded), and **Standard** (grade-level)
- Two practice modes: **Practice mode** (hints available, no time pressure) and **Test mode** (timed, simulates real SOL conditions)
- Built-in accessibility accommodations: text-to-speech, dyslexia-friendly font (OpenDyslexic), bionic reading, high-contrast mode, extended time, up to 3 hints per question
- Parent dashboard to manage up to multiple children, each with independent grade/tier/accommodations settings
- Session history and streak tracking per child
- 100% free — no credit card, no paywall

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://solprep.app): Overview of features, how it works, and a sign-up prompt
- [Our Story](https://solprep.app/our-story): Why SolPrep was built — a Virginia parent's experience finding no SOL prep that worked for a child with special needs
- [Blog](https://solprep.app/blog): Engineering and product articles
- [How We Used AI to Build SolPrep](https://solprep.app/blog/how-we-built-solprep-with-ai): Deep dive into the AI pipeline — PDF extraction, question generation with Claude, LLM-as-judge quality filtering, SVG math diagram generation
- [Privacy Policy](https://solprep.app/privacy): Data collected, retention, COPPA/FERPA considerations
- [Terms of Service](https://solprep.app/terms): Usage terms; includes disclaimer that SolPrep is not affiliated with SOLPrep.com

## Who It's For

- **Parents** of Virginia students in grades 3–8, especially those with IEPs, 504 plans, dyslexia, ADHD, or other learning differences
- **Students** practicing independently for Virginia SOL tests
- **Educators** looking for free, standards-aligned SOL practice with accommodation support

## Technical Stack (for developers/researchers)

- Next.js (App Router) deployed on Vercel
- Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage) for backend
- Questions generated and quality-filtered using Claude (Anthropic)
- Math diagrams generated as inline SVG by Claude
- Adaptive tier logic: parent sets starting tier per child; system suggests promotions based on session performance

## What SolPrep Is Not

- Not affiliated with the Virginia Department of Education (VDOE)
- Not affiliated with SOLPrep.com (separate, unrelated site)
- Not a tutoring service — it is self-directed practice
- Not a paid subscription — it is entirely free
